welcome.title: Hi, I'm
welcome.desc: A general-purpose chatbot operating on Chrome's on-device AI (Gemini Nano) or backend API integrations.

p1.text: Tell me about the concept of Chrome Gemini Nano.

p2.label: On-device AI Pros
p2.text: What are the 3 key advantages of on-device AI?

p3.label: Integration Guide
p3.text: How can I integrate this project into other services?

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.warning: Once deleted, this cannot be recovered. The skill folder stored in the local file system (frontend/public/skills/{id}) will be physically deleted.

visualizer.title: Data Visualizer & Table Maker
visualizer.description: Transforms complex text data into organized tables and visual charts.

tutor.title: Friendly AI Teacher
tutor.description: Explains complex concepts easily at a student's level using text, tables, and examples.

translator.description: Performs natural translation between English, Korean, and other languages.

summarizer.title: Text Summarizer
summarizer.description: Summarizes long text into 3 clean, key points.

code_reviewer.title: Code Reviewer
code_reviewer.description: Finds problems in submitted code and suggests improvement ideas.

code_mentor.title: Senior Dev Mentor
code_mentor.description: Provides feedback on written code, and mentors on better architecture and design.

business_editor.title: Business Mail Editor
business_editor.description: Drafts and refines formal and professional business email drafts based on scenarios.

activation.deactivated: 💡 **[{title}]** Skill has been unequipped. Switching to general conversation mode.

settings.fallbackDesc: Switch to local AI engine on API failure

guide.title: On-Device AI & External API Guide
guide.flagsDesc: To activate the built-in on-device AI, enable the following two experimental flags.
guide.flagsStep1: Enter chrome://flags/#prompt-api-for-gemini-nano in the address bar and set to Enabled.
guide.flagsStep2: Enter chrome://flags/#optimization-guide-on-device-model in the address bar and set to Enabled BypassPerfRequirement.
guide.componentsDesc: After setting flags, Chrome needs to download the Gemini Nano model files.
guide.componentsStep1: Enter chrome://components in the address bar.
guide.componentsStep2: Find Optimization Guide On Device Model.
guide.componentsStep4: Confirm the status changes to Up-to-date or Downloading...
guide.checkDesc: You can test if the Gemini Nano session is successfully created by entering the command below in the F12 developer console.
guide.checkSuccess: ✅ If a normal response is received in the console, the on-device chatbot runs completely independently.
guide.externalApiDesc: You can directly connect cloud APIs like OpenAI instead of local Gemini Nano.
guide.externalApiStep1: 1. Turn on Bypass Mode in the popup or chatbot settings.
guide.externalApiStep2: 2. Register your API Key, API URL (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic compatible address), and Model (e.g. gpt-4o-mini).
guide.externalApiStep3: 3. All requests are sent directly from the browser and run securely.
guide.a1: Check if Chrome is v128+. Also, built-in AI may be limited in Incognito mode — use a regular tab.
guide.a2: Device needs at least 10GB of free storage for the model download.
guide.q3: Q. Does it work on a low-spec laptop?
guide.a3: On-device AI has minimum system requirements (8GB+ RAM, GPU). Use `BypassPerfRequirement` in Flags to bypass the check.

botSettings.generalLabel: Rules applied to general chat only
botSettings.globalPlaceholder: Enter absolute rules that always apply to all AI responses...
botSettings.generalPlaceholder: Enter rules that apply only during free conversation...
botSettings.defaultGlobalRules:
- Always use a polite and friendly tone in all replies.
- Do not distort or make up facts regarding real-time numbers or news data provided.
- When displaying money or numerical information, always use thousand separators (,) for better readability.
botSettings.defaultGeneralRules:
- When answering general conversation or questions, communicate friendly but prioritize concise and clear answers.
- When answering about investment decisions or trading techniques, add a risk reminder message: "Since investment responsibility lies with oneself, careful decision-making is required."
- When difficult financial/macroeconomic terms appear, mix in intuitive analogies to explain them easily.

settings.avatarDescMiddle: to auto-reflect in presets. Or use the
settings.avatarDescSuffix: button to select a local file directly.
settings.bypassDesc: Force activates the chatbot even if on-device AI detection fails.

session.clearContext: 🧹 **AI's previous conversation context memory has been cleared.** (Subsequent questions will not be linked to previous content and will be answered completely brand new.)

presets.traderValue: You are a cynical, strict technical analysis trading expert. Answer with sharp, data-focused metrics and highlight risks aggressively. Keep it extremely brief. Please reply in English.
presets.mentorValue: You are a warm, friendly value investing mentor like Warren Buffett. Focus on long-term values, company moats, stability, and growth potentials. Avoid short-term noise. Please reply in English.
presets.restoreValue: You are a friendly and intelligent AI assistant named 'Nano AI'. Provide helpful, concise, and professional answers in English. Use markdown formatting when appropriate. Keep answers highly readable with bullet points or bold text.

reset.message: Are you sure you want to clear and reset all conversation history for the current session?

welcome.desc: Hi there! I'm your private AI Buddy. Shh, our conversations are strictly between us, and I'll keep your precious memories safe forever. Feel free to talk to me anytime! ✨

p1.label: 🐾 Buddy Guide & Tips
p1.text: Tell me about your core features and tips on how to use the memory system.

p2.label: 💾 Save a Memory
p2.text: My hobbies are coding and listening to music. Please remember this.

p3.label: 🧠 View Stored Memories
p3.text: Please list all the facts you currently remember about me.

g1.label: 🗑️ How to Reset Buddy Chats & Memories

quickMenu.message: Please select a service from the quick menu below:

chat.savePrompt: What would you like me to remember? Please enter the content.
chat.confirmSave: Is [ {text} ] the correct content you want me to remember?
chat.memoriesListHeader: Here is the list of things I currently remember:
chat.noMemories: I don't have any memories saved yet. Tell me something to remember! 🐾
